nasb.text: So the Lord God caused a deep sleep to fall upon the man, and he slept; then He took one of his ribs and closed up the flesh at that place.

esv.text: So the Lord God caused a deep sleep to fall upon the man, and while he slept took one of his ribs and closed up its place with flesh.

cnv.text: 耶和華　神使那人沉睡。他熟睡的時候，耶和華　神取了他的一根肋骨，又使肉在原處復合。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝使那人沉睡，然后从他身上取出一根肋骨，再把肉合起来。

csbs.text: 耶和华神使那人陷入沉睡，那人就睡着了；神取出他的一根肋骨，又在原处把肉合起来。
